title: plantago australis subsp. dielsiana
intro: Plantago australis subsp. dielsiana, also known as the Tasmanian plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Plantago australis subsp. dielsiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
